author: PC Gamer
text:
I’m waiting days between attempts to catch one fish in Final Fantasy 14 before it disappears for months, so don’t let anyone tell you raids are the ‘hardcore’ challenge
If you thought I was bad at dodging bright lines on the floor, wait until you've seen me fish.

author: PC Gamer
text:
A domain related to J-Pop idol phenomenon Love Live! went up for auction and the lead bid is a very sane $615 million
Love Live… Profit?!?

author: PC Gamer
text:
The Fortnite-Overwatch crossover means we're talking about Tracer's butt again
Because of course we are.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Videogame pirates tell other pirates to shut up about it after Subnautica 2 developers are taunted with illicit copies
A breach of pirate etiquette has even pirates siding with a Subnautica 2 designer.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Overwatch's lackluster 10th anniversary event will have its rewards improved next week, with more free stuff planned for later this year
Game director Aaron Keller acknowledged players' disappointment with the event on X.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Subnautica 2's early access roadmap promises quality-of-life additions, co-op improvements, and—eventually—new biomes and creatures
The ocean's got room for more.

author: PC Gamer
text:
We can thank a Jim Henson Company puppeteer for some of Valve's best animation work
TF2, Left 4 Dead, and Portal have some Fraggle Rock in them.

author: PC Gamer
text:
GamesRadar has decamped to Kyoto to bring you some killer world premieres and trailers straight out of BitSummit Punch 2026
We just came in and found a letter in Japanese on their desks. We assume this is what it says.

author: PC Gamer
text:
I'm tired of everything getting turned into a roguelite, but I'll make an exception for pinball
My weakness has been laser targeted.

author: PC Gamer
text:
I’m waiting days between attempts to catch one fish in Final Fantasy 14 before it disappears for months, so don’t let anyone tell you raids are the ‘hardcore’ challenge
If you thought I was bad at dodging bright lines on the floor, wait until you've seen me fish.

author: PC Gamer
text:
6 million more people are using Firefox because of new EU rules, which is good news for Chrome haters like me
Other third-party browsers are seeing upticks too.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Sink your teeth into V Rising for free this weekend, and you can grab the full game for less than half price
All DLC is also 20% off.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Fallout's creator reveals you could have played as a snoring cow hater who believes in UFOs, had Black Isle stuck with its original licensed roleplaying system
Tim Cain spills the tea on "GURPS Fallout".

author: PC Gamer
text:
I've been pixelating things again for our latest quiz—this time you have to guess which 10 videogame characters I've mangled
It's like going back to the 1980s.

author: PC Gamer
text:
MercurySteam announces 'difficult and painful' job cuts as its God of War-inspired hack 'n' slash arrives on Steam
The developer of Blades of Fire has initiated a "workforce adjustment process."

text:

author: PC Gamer
text:
GTA roleplayers built a secret Boiler Room rave beneath Los Santos, complete with DJs, club photographers, biker security, and a custom party drug
With nearly 100 players packed into an underground bunker.

author: PC Gamer
text:
MMOs are better if classes are imbalanced—you just need to do it on purpose
Perfectly balanced, as all things shouldn't be.

author: PC Gamer
text:
This game about being a chaotic mage might be the best indie immersive sim you can play, as I learned after destroying a mime's house with magnetism
Rhell: Warped Worlds & Troubled Times is a delight.
